items.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Unveils Myeloma Trial Win And New Gulf Leadership
items.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) reported positive Phase III SUCCESSOR-2 trial results in multiple myeloma at a major medical conference. The company highlighted early clinical success for a new CAR T-cell therapy targeting blood cancers. Bristol Myers Squibb appointed a new General Manager to lead its operations across the Gulf region.
